name: UniBond Sanitary Silicone Sealant White Silicone-based Bathroom & Kitchen Cartridge Sealant
description:
Ensure a hygienic and durable seal in your bathroom and kitchen with the UniBond Sanitary Silicone Sealant. This high-performance, silicone-based formula provides excellent adhesion and long-lasting flexibility, making it ideal for sealing around sinks, baths, showers, and countertops.

Specifically designed to resist mold and mildew growth, this white sealant helps maintain a clean and fresh appearance in moisture-prone areas. Its convenient cartridge format ensures easy application, delivering a professional finish for both new installations and renovation projects.
